jd_text: Role : Senior/ Manager - Tourism & Culture Advisory Experience: 8 - 15 Years Location: Dubai, UAE Must Have Strong background in Tourism, Culture, Strategic Consulting, Transformation, Policy, Hospitality, Urban Planning or Destination Development. Experience managing complex, multi-stakeholder government programs. Fluent English required; Arabic strongly preferred. Willingness to travel across the GCC. About the Role: Seeking a Manager/Senior Manager to deliver strategic transformation engagements across the Tourism & Culture sector in the UAE and wider GCC region. This is a delivery-focused role with regional exposure, reporting to Director / MD level. Key Responsibilities: You will lead client-facing advisory projects for government and semi-government entities, focusing on: Tourism & Culture strategy development. Sector transformation & operating model design. Public policy & regulatory advisory. Destination development & hospitality ecosystems. Program / PMO leadership and project management. Revenue optimization and economic impact initiatives.
